chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-271 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.05.2025 Mr. Ghulamullah Chang Advocate along with Applicant. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Qassar Advocate who has filed power on behalf of Respondents No.3&5. Mr. Shawak Rathore, D.P.G. -.-.-. The Order was passed on last date of hearing when Respondent No.2 SHO PS Pangrio was directed to produce the detenues. Today both the detenues have been produced who are present before the Court. Detenue No.1 being sui juris states that they are under no illegal confinement and are happily living their life. In light of her statement this matter stands disposed of while allowing her to live her life happily according to her wishes and whims. J U D G E Ali Haider
